evals.prompt: Convert my Hudi table at s3://lake/orders to Iceberg. It's partitioned by order_date (daily, paths look like 2026-06-11).
evals.expected_output: Valid YAML with partitionSpec order_date:DAY:yyyy-MM-dd shown for confirmation, then run + Conversion Report with per-table verdict

evals.prompt: Sync s3://lake/orders and s3://lake/sales from Hudi to both Delta and Iceberg, register under namespace analytics.core in our Glue catalog.
evals.expected_output: Multi-dataset config with namespace, asks for/uses icebergCatalogConfig, asks about partitioning for each Hudi table, ends with Conversion Report

evals.prompt: Make this Delta table queryable from Snowflake: abfs://gold@eglake.dfs.core.windows.net/bookings
evals.expected_output: Infers DELTA source -> ICEBERG target, asks nothing unnecessary, flags that abfs verification needs hadoop CLI (UNVERIFIED otherwise) before running
Asks for source format and table path; never guesses a path

evals.prompt: Convert the Iceberg table at s3://lake/inventory to Hudi
evals.expected_output: Requires tableDataPath (suggests s3://lake/inventory/data), no partitionSpec, Conversion Report at the end
